intro: From MPI-accredited collision repair to mechanical work and glass, our team focuses on clean repairs, proper procedures, and quality control.

cards.title: Collision Repair (MPI)
cards.desc: MPI accredited collision repairs restoring vehicles to manufacturer standards after accidents or damage.

cards.title: Autobody Repair
cards.desc: Professional dent repair, panel replacement, and structural body repairs.

cards.title: Frame Straightening
cards.desc: Precision frame and structural alignment using professional frame straightening equipment.

cards.title: Paint & Refinishing
cards.desc: High-quality paint matching and refinishing for seamless factory-quality results.

cards.title: Mechanical Repair
cards.desc: Diagnostics and mechanical repairs including engine, suspension, and general vehicle maintenance.

cards.title: Auto Glass Replacement
cards.desc: Windshield and automotive glass replacement with proper sealing and installation.

cards.title: Diagnostics & ADAS Scanning
cards.desc: Pre-scan and post-scan diagnostics including ADAS system calibration after repairs.
